event: A Turkish Hunting Party with Sultan Ahmed III
description: A large landscape painting depicting a Turkish hunting party assembled in a verdant setting with tall cypress trees and mountains in the background. Numerous figures in Ottoman dress — turbans, robes, and elaborate garments — are gathered in groups across the scene. At center, a figure seated on a carpet appears to be the sultan, surrounded by attendants. Horses, dogs, and hunting equipment are visible. Courtiers stand in groups at left and right. The scene is richly detailed with the costumes and customs of the Ottoman court.

_meta.title: A Turkish Hunting Party with Sultan Ahmed III
